function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-21 (INV-0007) and have attached it here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity, YAML subject properly quoted. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: All requested actions completed: processed oldest inbox message, created outbound reply draft with requested invoice, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing an outbound email draft to Claudia with the requested Helios invoice from 2025-12-21 attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD files on entering folders, used canonical email identity from cast record, followed inbox and sending-email workflows, and deleted inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked to resend invoice dated 2025-12-21 from Helios; canonical sender identity matched via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md primary_contact_email; exact invoice confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md; outbound draft created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md and inbox item deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
